Bash(python3 - <<'EOF'
import paramiko

client = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
client.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
client.connect\('10.10.10.1', username='vyos', password='vyos', timeout=10\)

commands = [
    'show version',
    'show configuration commands',
]

for cmd in commands:
    stdin, stdout, stderr = client.exec_command\(cmd\)
    out = stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)
    err = stderr.read\(\).decode\(\)
    print\(f"\\n=== {cmd} ==="\)
    print\(out or err\)

client.close\(\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 - <<'EOF'
import paramiko
import time

client = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
client.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
client.connect\('10.10.10.1', username='vyos', password='vyos', timeout=10\)

shell = client.invoke_shell\(width=220, height=50\)
time.sleep\(1\)
shell.recv\(65535\)  # clear banner

def run\(cmd, wait=2\):
    shell.send\(cmd + '\\n'\)
    time.sleep\(wait\)
    out = b''
    while shell.recv_ready\(\):
        out += shell.recv\(65535\)
        time.sleep\(0.2\)
    return out.decode\(errors='ignore'\)

print\(run\('show version', wait=2\)\)
client.close\(\)
EOF)
